title: listrostachys palmiformis
intro: Listrostachys palmiformis, also known as the Queñua or Queñua de Montaña, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountains in South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Listrostachys palmiformis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Listrostachys palmiformis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
